text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan A
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! Please, give it your all for the fall
season!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Look! I made this golden banner to complement
your shimmering splendor!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Thank you very much. I will do my utmost
every day to meet your expectations.
choice_data_list: (Her fans really take things to the next level!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Wow, what graceful hand waving... McQueen's
elegance knows no bounds.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan D
text_block_list.text:
I've never had the opportunity to speak with her
trainer. But I imagine he's wonderful too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan D
text_block_list.text:
I've never had the opportunity to speak with her
trainer. But I imagine she's wonderful too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan E
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm certain her trainer has exquisite manners!
Someone personally selected by McQueen could
never say anything uncouth!
choice_data_list: (Uncouth?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A chill runs down my spine. I feel I could shatter
their image of me at any given moment. Or
worse...
choice_data_list: (What if my actions impact McQueen's image?!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Is something the matter?
choice_data_list:
Oh no, th–there is nothing whatsoever amiss, I
assure you, Miss McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer? Why are you speaking like that?
choice_data_list: S-sorry! I sounded weird, didn't I?
S-sorry! I sounded weird, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely inexcusable. I need to learn the basics
of proper etiquette as soon as possible!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Goodness.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fans
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...
choice_data_list: (Her fans are here yet again...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Do you have a moment, Trainer? I have a
suggestion for you today.
choice_data_list: Wh-what is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we go somewhere else to talk first?
Here, there are far too many eyes on us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I believe we've covered enough distance to be
safe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So, to get into the crux of things...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Take this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sploosh!
choice_data_list: Ack, that's cold!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry, I've prepared a water gun for
you too! Now, go ahead and douse me as much as
you see fit!
choice_data_list: Huh, what do you mean?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I mean what I said. Come on, your guard is
completely lowered!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Take this, and this!
choice_data_list: J-just wait a second!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: There's no time to wait! Hehe... hurry up now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen doesn't appear willing to hear
me out. So I follow her instructions...
choice_data_list: All right, I won't wait for you, either!
All right, I won't wait for you, either!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Fine by me. Come at me with your best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm utterly soaked...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. There's no need to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it's precisely because you approach
everything with such intensity that I'm able to be
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you are and always have been a
wonderful person. Forcing yourself to change is a
wasted effort.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
After all, you are the trainer that I, Mejiro
McQueen, have personally chosen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Should I take a photo of your face right now to
serve as a reminder?
choice_data_list: ...No, it's fine. I'll always remember today.
...No, it's fine. I'll always remember today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That settles things, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness, you're soaked from head to toe!
What is the cause for this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh! Well, you see...
choice_data_list:
This is part of our special training for the fall
season.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, is that so?! I wouldn't expect anything less
from you two! What tactful thinking!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Silly you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should have taken a photo of your face
after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...You look so much more dignified now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Look! I made this golden banner to complement
your shimmering splendor!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Thank you very much. I will do my utmost
every day to meet your expectations.
choice_data_list: (Her fans really take things to the next level!)

Wow, what graceful hand waving... McQueen's
elegance knows no bounds.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan D
text_block_list.text:
I've never had the opportunity to speak with her
trainer. But I imagine he's wonderful too.

text_block_list.text:
I've never had the opportunity to speak with her

All right, I won't wait for you, either!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Fine by me. Come at me with your best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm utterly soaked...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. There's no need to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... but perhaps I got a little carried away
there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I can put that down to your influence?
...Just kidding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day...
choice_data_list: McQueen, that was a great time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! McQueen's trainer behaves just as elegantly as
her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying how tight their bond is!
Absolutely splendid!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
See how wonderful of a person you are when you
act as your usual self and don't resort to
pretenses?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So, please, do not force yourself any further.
choice_data_list: Okay, I won't.
Okay, I won't.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that is good to hear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: To tell the truth, seeing you act all formal...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Made me feel like I had lost something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Fan B
text_block_list.text:

your shimmering splendor!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Deary me. Ryan, why are you impeding our way forward?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see... McQueen's looking in top shape today,
so I got curious!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm? She looks the same as always to me. Why, she's
even together with her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I agree with Ryan, something feels different. Look
at her eagerly awaiting her trainer's next instructions!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Settle down now, Palmer. Lean any further and
you might grab their attention.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why are you all here?!

text_block_list.name: The Mejiros
text_block_list.text:
Eeek!
Aaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, noticing the other Mejiros
camping by the rocks, charges after them
red-faced.
